patch.value: npm publish 403: package name unscoped pm-web rejected (too similar to pmweb) — restore @unbrained/pm-web

Daily Release run 27448994089 got past all pipeline fixes and failed at npm publish with E403: 'Package name too similar to existing package pmweb; try renaming your package to @unbrained/pm-web'. Commit 8100c48 (2026-06-09 'Align website release policy with private deployment') renamed package.json from @unbrained/pm-web to pm-web; PR #7 reverted the private:true half of that commit but missed the name. npm has @unbrained/pm-web@2026.6.9 published — the scoped name is the only publishable one. Fix restores the scoped name in package.json + package-lock.json; manifest.json keeps extension id pm-web (historical layout per 0c83657).
Daily Release publishes @unbrained/pm-web to npm successfully
Scoped name restored; tests 35/35; changelog regenerated
